advice.generic: Blinding Light should be interrupted to prevent dangerous group disruption.
advice.healer: Be ready for recovery if a cast gets through, but prevention is the goal.
advice.dps: Prioritize Blinding Light casts from Sun Priestesses.

153757.name: Fan of Blades

advice.generic: Fan of Blades bleed is dangerous; use defensives and bleed cleanse where available.
advice.healer: Use major healing during Fan of Blades and track bleed-cleansable targets.
advice.dps: Use a personal or bleed removal; do not add avoidable damage during the bleed.

153757.notes: Boss bleed; bleed-cleanse or defensive coverage.

154044.name: Lens Flare
154044.summary: Targets a player and leaves Blazing Ground puddles where they stand.

advice.generic: Lens Flare targets a player and leaves Blazing Ground; targeted player moves away from allies and places puddles along the edge/previous bad to preserve room.
advice.tank: Keep Viryx positioned so the targeted player can leave without dragging the boss/add out of cleave range.
advice.healer: Spot heal the Lens Flare target and be ready for Scorching Ray overlap.
advice.dps: If targeted, move out decisively and place ground where it will not cut off the group.

advice.generic: Solar Blast should be interrupted on High Sage Viryx.
advice.healer: Prepare spot healing only when a kick is missed.
advice.dps: Hold kicks for Solar Blast; do not spend all interrupts on lower-priority casts.

advice.generic: During Chakram Vortex, dodge the incoming Gale Surge/Wind Chakram patterns; do not stand in the returning path.
advice.tank: Move Ranjit away from Wind Chakram so melee are not killed by the return path.
advice.healer: Plan healing during Fan of Blades while the group is moving for chakrams.
advice.dps: Track both outgoing and returning chakrams; uptime is secondary to not being one-shot.

advice.generic: Line of sight Searing Quills; use pillars/terrain rather than trying to heal through it.
advice.tank: Keep Rukhran in melee and near usable line-of-sight options without forcing bad Sunwing spawns.
advice.healer: Do not plan to brute-force Quills; help top players before they line.
advice.dps: Move to line of sight early; do not wait for the channel to start ticking.

advice.generic: Gale Surge knocks players back and spawns wind orbs; pre-position so the knockback does not send you off the platform or into hazards.
advice.tank: Position the boss so the group has safe knockback direction and melee is away from returning chakrams.
advice.healer: Be ready to heal while players are displaced and dodging wind orbs.
advice.dps: Check your back before the cast and use movement if the knockback path is unsafe.

advice.generic: Solar Nova is a large AoE from Solar Construct; get out of range and use a personal if you cannot escape in time.
advice.tank: Keep constructs positioned so melee have an exit path for Nova.
advice.healer: Expect avoidable spikes when players are trapped by other trash.
advice.dps: Move out early; this is not a soak.

1254475.name: Blade Rush

advice.generic: Blade Rush leaves a bleed; remove with bleed cleanse where available or use a personal during overlaps.
advice.healer: Spot heal the target if bleed cannot be removed.
advice.dps: If targeted, use defensive/bleed cleanse and avoid stacking additional hits.

1254475.notes: Bleed from Blade Rush; bleed-cleanse or defensive.

advice.generic: Repel should be interrupted to avoid a mass knockback, especially near platform edges.
advice.tank: Position mobs away from edges when Repel casters are active.
advice.healer: Expect fall/knockback mistakes if Repel is missed.
advice.dps: Kick Repel; this is a control/safety cast, not filler.

advice.generic: Wind Blast explodes around Raging Squall; run away before the explosion and use defensives during Wrathful Wind overlaps.
advice.tank: Avoid dragging the pull into corners where players cannot escape Wind Blast.
advice.healer: Prepare spot healing during Wrathful Wind and after late Wind Blast exits.
advice.dps: Leave melee early for the explosion; greed is expensive here.

advice.generic: Solar Fire targets a player with fire damage; use a personal/combat drop if available and avoid overlapping with Solar Nova.
advice.healer: Spot heal Solar Fire targets during construct pulls.
advice.dps: Use defensives or combat reset if targeted and low.

advice.generic: Defensive Protocol sends heat waves; dodge the waves while continuing to soak solar beams as assigned.
advice.tank: Keep Araknath in melee and face Fiery Smash away so wave dodging remains possible.
advice.healer: Top players before Supernova and spot heal beam soakers.
advice.dps: Dodge waves first; soak beams only when safe and assigned.
